title: Dangote Cement EBITDA crosses N1 trillion mark as Shareholders smile home with N30 dividend per share - FinancialEDGE
description: For the first time since its inception, Dangote Cement Group’s earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, and amortization (EBITDA) reached an all-time milestone of N1,382.0 billion, crossing the N1 trillion mark, an increase of 56 per cent. In the same vein, Earnings per share also increased by 12.3 per cent to N29.74 as against 2023’s record
